docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY BATTIS, JEREMY AKIL, ADNAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATTIS, JEREMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AKIL, ADNAN $4,068.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,228.00, PLAINTIFF ENTITLED TO RECOVER FOR UNPAID HOA DUE, UNPAID UTILITY BILLS AND DEFENDANT'S UNAUTHORIZED WITHDRAWAL OF HOA FUNDS. PLAINTIFF WAS ALSO REQUIRED TO EXERT ADDITIONAL EFFORTS IN MAINTAINING THE PROPERTY AND IS ENTITLED TO REASONABLE COMPENSATION FOR THOSE EFFORTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF OCT-01-2019
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY BATTIS, JEREMY AS TO DEFENDANT AKIL, ADNAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF JEREMY BATTIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADNAN AKIL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $85.00) SERVED APR-04-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AKIL, ADNAN
